calendar.matters:
Motion To Strike Portions Of Complaint
Off Calendar Dec-06-2004 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
RULING:
NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. DEFENDANTS LOUISE HAMEN AND JOSEPH RIDLON'S Motion To Strike Portions Of Complaint: OFF CALENDAR; First Amended Complaint filed 11/9/04. (301/JLW/) Reporter: Christina T. Paxton, CSR #1558

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Nov-16-2004 Reset For Jury Trial

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Dec-06-2004 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Dec-06-2004 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on as re-assigned by the Master Calendar Dept. 206 for Prove-Up Hearing/Court Trial this day.
Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Tony Vaughn.
Sally Morin, Esq. for Plaintiff: Kevin Klemmick, present, was sworn and direct examined.
No appearance by the Defendants: Joe Ridlon and Louise Hamen.
Exh. 1 - Five-day notice---------ID/EVID.
After hearing the evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defendants: Joe Ridlon and Louise Hamen as follows:
Restitution and possession of the premises located at 1598 Custer Ave., San Francisco.
Rent and Per Diem Damages of $21,280.16
No fees or costs.
Counsel stipulated for the return of the Exhibit in open court.
Judgment signed in open court.
